visual_description: Two men in light blue shirts and ties sit side by side in an office, one with arms crossed, both looking toward the right. A woman in a beige uniform stands behind them, facing forward with her hands clasped. A monitor in front of the men displays a security camera feed of a hallway, with a timestamp reading "16:15".
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a steady pace and moderate pitch, in a quiet environment with no background noise.
